formal_convergence_definition: First cycle of 10 consecutive cycles with new_max_abs_dev < epsilon_tol. Non-converged runs are right-censored: run cycle is NULL and converged=false; condition median treats them as +infinity and is NULL when convergence rate <=50%.
auxiliary_mean_definition: Same rule using new_mean_abs_dev; auxiliary only.
mingap_convergence_definition: First cycle of 10 consecutive cycles with min_gap_rad > 2*pi*occupied_time_ms/cycle_time_ms; same censoring rule.
initial_phase_prefix_policy: device-ID-order first N values from each unsorted 50-device run
simultaneous_collision_policy: all send_log rows sharing an exact start time within a cycle fail demodulation
changes_from_v1: unique-within-run initial phase master with a new seed
formal max-gap-deviation convergence with censored condition median
min_gap_rad metric and collision-free min-gap convergence
